calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee & Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thea Eliot for Bank of the West (Petitioner). Myron Greenberg (Proposed Successor Trustee) and for Stuart Bewley.

The Court indicated that the issue is the waiver of bond from one of the beneficiary who is 16 years old. The Court reviewed the Declaration by Ms. Eliot regarding the issue and granted the Petition for Order Accepting Resignation of Trustee and Appointing Successor Trustee with Waiver of Bond (subject to review of order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
